prompt: Create a vertically stacked comparison image with exactly 2 horizontal sections: the top section is a minimalist studio product shot of 1 small enamel refrigerator magnet, centered on a pale textured blue background with lots of negative space; the magnet is shaped like a miniature mountain landscape souvenir, with a shiny gold-metal outline, raised enamel details, snow-capped blue-gray peaks, green rolling hills, dark evergreen trees, and a foreground band of tiny yellow, purple, and blue wildflowers, casting a soft realistic shadow. The bottom section is a bright realistic landscape photo of an alpine grassland valley under a blue sky with fluffy white clouds: wide green rolling hills, distant snow-streaked mountains, dark pine forests, and a colorful wildflower meadow in the foreground with yellow, purple, and blue blooms. Include exactly 4 horseback riders crossing the meadow near the lower center, small in scale against the vast scenery. Make the magnet in the top section feel like a distilled souvenir version of the landscape below, preserving the same key visual elements: mountains, green hills, conifer trees, wildflowers, and open sky. Use clean editorial composition, realistic lighting, crisp detail, soft shadows, and a calm travel-memory aesthetic. No visible text, no labels, no watermark.
